bbq.Name: Classic Mixed BBQ Platter
bbq.description: A mouth-watering assortment of grilled chicken drumsticks, spicy sausages, and marinated chicken breasts, served with grilled lemon and bell peppers for an authentic smoky flavor.

bbq.Name: Deluxe Grill Feast
bbq.description: An ultimate grilling experience featuring premium beef sausages, succulent steak medallions, chicken skewers, and grilled mushrooms with charred corn on the cob.

bbq.Name: Signature Shish Kebab & Ribs Board
bbq.description: A rustic presentation of flame-grilled chicken and beef kebabs, tender lamb ribs, and roasted vegetables including eggplant and bell peppers.

bbq.Name: Flame-Grilled Prime Ribeye
bbq.description: Experience the ultimate fire-kissed flavor with our hand-cut prime ribeye steak, seared over an open flame.

bbq.Name: Grilled Bone-In Pork Chops
bbq.description: Thick-cut, bone-in pork chops grilled to perfection over charcoal with charred bell peppers.

bbq.Name: Surf & Turf Mixed Grill
bbq.description: The ultimate outdoor feast featuring whole grilled trout, salmon fillets, beef steaks, and spicy sausages.

bbq.Name: Street Style Charcoal Shashlik
bbq.description: Authentic charcoal-grilled shashlik featuring tender marinated meat chunks on long skewers.

bbq.Name: Herb-Infused Seafood & Chicken Grill
bbq.description: Fresh whole fish with rosemary, chicken skewers, and golden buttered corn slow-cooked over coals.

bbq.Name: Mediterranean BBQ Kofta Platter
bbq.description: Flame-grilled minced meat kebabs served with hummus, tomato-glazed potatoes, and tzatziki.

bbq.Name: Middle Eastern BBQ Feast
bbq.description: Grand spread featuring shish taouk, falafel, kibbeh, manakish, and tabbouleh salad.

bbq.Name: Authentic Beef Adana Kebab
bbq.description: Spiced minced beef skewers with lahmacun-style flatbread and hummus.

bbq.Name: Grilled Liver & Potato Medley
bbq.description: Flame-grilled liver paired with crispy roasted potatoes and herb chimichurri.

bbq.Name: Slow-Roasted Beef Brisket
bbq.description: Tender beef brisket with balsamic reduction and shoestring sweet potato fries.

bbq.Name: Grilled Steak with Gravy & Flatbread
bbq.description: Grilled beef medallions in gravy served on traditional flatbread.

bbq.Name: Flame-Grilled Kofta & Vegetable Skewers
bbq.description: Minced meat koftas and cherry tomato skewers grilled over an open flame.

bbq.Name: Flame-Kissed Garden Veggie Grill
bbq.description: Charred zucchini, bell peppers, and eggplant with a smoky finish.

bbq.Name: Wok-Seared Rainbow Vegetable Stir-Fry
bbq.description: Crunchy medley of broccoli, snap peas, and baby corn in ginger-garlic soy glaze.

seafood.Name: Premium Nigiri & Salmon Tataki Platter
seafood.description: An exquisite Japanese seafood selection featuring fresh Salmon, Tuna, and Whitefish Nigiri, paired with delicately seared Salmon Tataki.

seafood.Name: Crispy Whole Sea Bass with Potato Wedges
seafood.description: A perfectly pan-fried whole Sea Bass with crispy skin, served alongside golden potato wedges and herb butter.

seafood.Name: Spicy Thai-Style Charcoal Snapper
seafood.description: Whole Red Snapper grilled over charcoal, smothered in a bold Thai chili-lime glaze and crushed peanuts.

seafood.Name: Signature Ahi Tuna Poke Bowl
seafood.description: A vibrant Hawaiian-style bowl with marinated Ahi tuna, avocado, and seaweed salad over sushi rice.

seafood.Name: Grilled Garlic Butter Lobster Platter
seafood.description: Succulent whole lobster tails grilled with garlic herb butter, served with charred corn and zucchini.

seafood.Name: Chilled Atlantic Blue Crab
seafood.description: Whole Atlantic Blue Crab served chilled on ice with a zesty remoulade sauce.

seafood.Name: Imperial Red King Crab Feast
seafood.description: Steamed Red King Crab with giant legs and a rich buttery crab meat bisque.

seafood.Name: Salt-Crusted Jumbo Tiger Prawns
seafood.description: Jumbo tiger prawns seared with sea salt, served with lemon and fresh greens.

seafood.Name: Classic Atlantic Steamed Lobster
seafood.description: A whole Atlantic lobster steamed to preserve its naturally sweet and tender meat.

seafood.Name: Lobster Sashimi with Citrus & Nasturtium
seafood.description: High-end lobster sashimi garnished with citrus zest, nasturtium leaves, and toasted grains.

desserts.Name: Forest Moss Cake with Fresh Blueberries
desserts.description: An enchanting dessert inspired by nature, featuring a vibrant green spinach-based sponge that mimics forest moss.

desserts.Name: Red Velvet Berry Fusion Slice
desserts.description: Moist red velvet cake layered with rich cream cheese frosting and a tangy berry compote.

desserts.Name: Rustic Strawberry & Elderflower Celebration Cake
desserts.description: A charming, semi-naked vanilla bean cake decorated with fresh garden strawberries and elderflower blossoms.

desserts.Name: Classic Red Velvet Layer Cake
desserts.description: Thick layers of moist red sponge filled and frosted with velvety smooth cream cheese icing.

desserts.Name: Triple-Layer Blueberry & Lilac Naked Cake
desserts.description: Triple-layer naked cake with almond-infused sponge and fresh blueberries.

desserts.Name: Rustic Apple & Almond Galette
desserts.description: Golden-brown rustic galette filled with seasonal apples and topped with crunchy flaked almonds.

desserts.Name: Classic Lattice Blackberry Pie
desserts.description: Handcrafted lattice crust pie bursting with sweet and tangy fresh blackberries.

desserts.Name: Cinnamon Dust Mini Lattice Pie
desserts.description: Individual-sized mini pie with a thick golden lattice crust and cinnamon sugar dusting.

desserts.Name: Winter Hazelnut & Cream Layer Cake
desserts.description: Elegant layer cake with roasted hazelnuts and a festive winter feel.

desserts.Name: Festive Cranberry & Custard Star Tart
desserts.description: Shortcrust tart filled with silky custard and a tangy cranberry swirl.

desserts.Name: Pomegranate & Apple Glazed Cheesecake
desserts.description: Chilled cheesecake topped with a ruby-red pomegranate glaze and crisp apple slices.

desserts.Name: Enchanted Rose & Blueberry Meringue Slice
desserts.description: Elegant slice with blueberry-infused cream and delicate white meringue peaks.

drinks.Name: Royal Berry Gold Elixir
drinks.description: A luxurious and vibrant mixed berry mocktail served in a tall ribbed glass. The rim is elegantly coated with edible gold leaf, and it's garnished with golden berries, fresh pink flowers, and a touch of greenery for a truly regal presentation.

drinks.Name: Midnight Berry Honey-Choc Smash
drinks.description: A deep magenta, velvety berry blend served in a uniquely textured diamond-patterned glass. This drink features a pink sugar-dusted rim and is artistically topped with a dark chocolate honeycomb lattice, fresh green leaves, and a delicate dried rosebud.

drinks.Name: Classic Citrus Negroni Mocktail
drinks.description: A sophisticated non-alcoholic take on the classic Negroni. This drink features a deep ruby hue with complex bitter and sweet notes, served over clear ice blocks and garnished with fresh orange slices and aromatic citrus peels for a refreshing finish.

drinks.Name: Sparkling Pink Lemonade with Popping Boba
drinks.description: A refreshing and playful sparkling pink lemonade served in textured highball glasses. This drink features golden popping boba pearls at the bottom for a burst of flavor, garnished with fresh lemon slices, mint, and delicate pea shoots.

drinks.Name: Sunset Spritz & Zesty Lime Duo
drinks.description: A perfect pair for sharing! Featuring a vibrant, orange-hued Sunset Spritz garnished with a fresh orange slice in a large wine glass, alongside a crisp, zesty lime mocktail served in a classic rocks glass with a fresh lime wheel garnish.

drinks.Name: Sophisticated Virgin Dry Martini
drinks.description: An elegant and crystal-clear non-alcoholic Martini served in chilled, gold-rimmed Nick and Nora glasses. This refined drink is expertly stirred and garnished with a skewered green olive and a fresh twist of lemon peel for a classic botanical aroma.

drinks.Name: Spiced Orange Cold Brew Mocktail
drinks.description: A sophisticated non-alcoholic drink featuring a deep, aromatic cold brew coffee base mixed with a hint of spiced syrup. Served over large crystal-clear ice cubes in heavy crystal glasses and garnished with fresh orange wedges for a bright, citrusy finish.

drinks.Name: Summer Garden Red Currant Punch
drinks.description: A vibrant and thirst-quenching summer punch made with fresh red currants and citrus. Served in elegant glassware on a vintage golden tray, it’s beautifully garnished with fresh mint, lemon wheels, and delicate pea shoots for a botanical touch.

drinks.Name: Kumquat & Nasturtium Crystal Sour
drinks.description: A sophisticated and bright botanical mocktail served in a vintage crystal coupe glass. This zesty drink features the tangy flavor of fresh kumquats, garnished with a whole kumquat on the rim, delicate nasturtium leaves, and a single red currant for a refined aesthetic.

drinks.Name: Blood Orange & Rosemary Silk Mocktail
drinks.description: A sophisticated and aromatic mocktail featuring fresh blood orange juice with a silky, frothy top. Served in a vintage crystal coupe, it's elegantly garnished with a long sprig of fresh rosemary and accompanied by caramelized blood orange slices for a deep, smoky-sweet profile.

drinks.Name: Smokey Ginger Whiskey Zest
drinks.description: A bold and invigorating golden-hued mocktail that mimics the complexity of a Smokey Ginger Whiskey. Served in a heavy rocks glass over plenty of ice, it's garnished with a dehydrated orange wheel and a unique nest of wild dried herbs for an earthy, aromatic experience.

drinks.Name: Azure Poolside Blue Lagoon
drinks.description: A refreshing tropical Blue Lagoon cocktail served in a vibrant blue ribbed glass. Topped with a fresh lemon wedge and served alongside traditional flower-shaped Thai sweets on a rustic wooden tray, perfect for a sunny day by the pool.
